title: 愚公移山
meaning: 比喻坚持不懈地改造自然

scenes.title: 愚公决心
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, an old man with long white beard in brown clothes pointing at two huge mountains blocking his door, determined face, family behind him
scenes.narration: 愚公年纪很大了，但他决心要移走门前的两座大山。

scenes.title: 全家人挖山
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, the old man with white beard leading his whole family digging at mountain with shovels and baskets, teamwork, dust flying
scenes.narration: 他带领全家人一起挖山不止。

scenes.title: 山神感动
scenes.prompt: Chinese children book illustration, cute cartoon style, warm colors, consistent art style, two mountain gods in clouds looking down at the determined old man, moved expression, mountains floating away, magical scene
scenes.narration: 他的精神感动了天神，帮他把山搬走了。
